articles.title: US Centcom says it completed 'self-defense strikes' against Iran
articles.summary: US Centcom says it completed 'self-defense strikes' against Iran US Central Command (Centcom) said that it completed "self-defense strikes" against Iran in response to the downing of an Apache helicopter a day earlier.  According to the statement, strikes targeted Iranian air defencem ground control stations and surveillance radar sites near the Strait of Hormuz. "The operation was a proportional response to recent attacks on U.S. forces and international commercial ships transiting regional waters," Centcom added.

articles.title: Korea’s Kospi Extends Losses on Chipmakers, War-Tied Jitters
articles.summary: South Korea’s equity benchmark slipped Wednesday, with chip stocks resuming losses and risk appetite weakening following a US strike on Iran.

articles.title: IRGC says it targeted US fleet in Bahrain
articles.summary: IRGC says it targeted US fleet in Bahrain Iran's Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps (IRGC) said they had launched drone attacks on the US Fifth Fleet in Bahrain in response to American "aggression". In a statement, the IRGC said that clashes were ongoing, and warned of a "more severe response" if US strikes continued.

articles.title: Blasts heard in Ahvaz, amid reports of damaged infrastructure in Sirik
articles.summary: Blasts heard in Ahvaz, amid reports of damaged infrastructure in Sirik The Mehr news agency is reporting of what seems to be explosions heard in the city of Ahvaz.  Elsewhere, Iran's Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps (IRGC) announced that US attacks damaged a telecommunications tower in the southern city of Sirik. The IRGC added that two water tanks were also destroyed in the area.
